title: detail
description: An object containing information about an individual check performed.

description.description: Human-readable description explaining the individual check.
description.example: Email address is correlated with the individual's name

label.description: Human-readable grouping describing the aspect of the customer's identity examined by this check.

result.description:
The result of the individual check. One of the following:
* `PASS` – the check passed contributing to a positive outcome (or accepted verification result).
* `WARN` – the results of the check were inconclusive and might require review.
* `FAIL` – the check failed and might result in a failing outcome (or rejected verification_result).

vendor_code.description: Machine-readable description of the individual check. This field contains vendor-specific terms and may not be populated in all cases.
